appDescription.message: Quick-capture web content and proxy AI requests for ThreatCaddy threat intelligence. Data stays local on your device by default.

saveFailed.message: Failed to save. Please try again.

noCaptures.message: No captures yet. Select text on any page and right-click to save.

allowCaddyAIDesc.message: Grants access to AI provider APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral).

allowUrlFetchingDesc.message: Required for the /fetch command and non-localhost local LLMs.

howToUseContextMenu.message: Select text and right-click "Save to ThreatCaddy"

howToUseShortcutSuffix.message: (clips selection, or full page if nothing selected)

privacyText.message: All data stays local on your device. API keys are sent only to your chosen provider. No tracking.

targetUrlDesc.message: The ThreatCaddy instance URL this extension connects to.

errorExtensionInvalidated.message: Extension context invalidated. Please reload this page.

errorHttpHttpsOnly.message: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are supported

errorUrlPermissionRequired.message: URL access permission required. Open the ThreatCaddy extension popup and enable "Allow URL fetching", then try again.

errorRequestTimedOut15.message: Request timed out (15s). The page may be unreachable.

errorBlockedInternal.message: Blocked: requests to internal/private addresses are not allowed

errorBlockedDomain.message: Blocked: $hostname$ is not in the allowed proxy domains list

errorCaddyAIPermission.message: CaddyAI permission required. Open the ThreatCaddy extension popup and enable "Allow CaddyAI" under Permissions.

errorHostPermissionLocalLLM.message: Host permission required for $hostname$. Open the ThreatCaddy extension popup and enable "Allow URL fetching" under Permissions.

errorTimedOutPageLoad.message: Timed out waiting for page to load

errorDeliverClips.message: Failed to deliver clips — bridge.js could not reach the page. Check that the extension has permission for this site.
